findings.description: PascalCase class names `RequestPathJavaPackageMapping` and `BatchAction` appear in the s2 content (handler queue list and processing flows) but are absent from the s2 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: HandlerQueue includes `RequestPathJavaPackageMapping`; flow arrays reference `BatchAction` in callback/inbound/outbound/error roles throughout all flow scenarios.

findings.description: The forcestop flow description omits the LoopHandler(error) and MultiThreadExecutionHandler(error) steps that are explicitly part of the forcestop flow in the source. LoopHandler(error) rolls back uncommitted records and callbacks business action; MultiThreadExecutionHandler(error) callbacks business action after abnormal end.
findings.source_evidence: forcestop flow: `["LoopHandler", "error", "複数件コミットを使用している場合は、未コミットの処理についてもロールバックされる。また業務アクションをコールバックする。"]` and `["MultiThreadExecutionHandler", "error", "異常終了後に業務アクションへのコールバックを行う。"]`
